message.content: {"items":[{"title":"IQB-Bildungstrend 2021 – Kompetenzen am Ende der 4. Jahrgangsstufe in den Fächern Deutsch und Mathematik im Ländervergleich","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8831","justification":"Includes primary school pupils (4th grade) across all German federal states including Schleswig-Holstein in 2021, covering competencies at the end of primary (pre‑secondary) education."},{"title":"IQB-Bildungstrend 2016 – Kompetenzen am Ende der 4. Jahrgangsstufe im Ländervergleich","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5859","justification":"Assesses competencies of 4th graders in all German Länder including Schleswig-Holstein at the end of primary school; 2016 is the baseline for later 2020s developments in compulsory primary education."},{"title":"NEPS Starting Cohort 2 – Kindergarten and Primary School (SC2) – Scientific Use File, version 12.0.0","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5989","justification":"Follows a cohort from kindergarten (pre‑school) into primary school across Germany; contains children from various Länder including Schleswig-Holstein and extends into the 2020s through panel waves."},{"title":"NEPS Starting Cohort 8 – Newborns (SC8) – Scientific Use File, version 10.0.0","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6804","justification":"Tracks early childhood development and care arrangements (including early education settings) for children born in Germany, with cases from Schleswig-Holstein and observation waves continuing into the 2020s."},{"title":"Forschungsdaten Grundschullehrkräftebefragung 2020","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA7708","justification":"Survey of German primary school teachers in 2020; includes respondents from Schleswig-Holstein, focusing on conditions and organization of compulsory primary education."},{"title":"School Barometer Germany, Austria and Switzerland 2020 – Coronavirus pandemic (Germany, consolidated file)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA7653","justification":"Covers school leaders’, teachers’, parents’ and students’ perspectives on schooling during COVID-19 in 2020; includes primary schools and preschools in Schleswig-Holstein as part of the German federal-state sample."},{"title":"COVID-19 and school closures: Survey among parents in Germany 2020","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA7678","justification":"Parent survey on learning and care during pandemic school closures, including children in compulsory primary education and pre-school settings across German Länder such as Schleswig-Holstein."},{"title":"Kinderbetreuungsstudie 2022 – Einstellungen von Eltern zur frühkindlichen Bildung und Betreuung","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA7915","justification":"2022 survey on parents’ attitudes to early childhood education and care in Germany, including daycare and pre-school arrangements; contains cases from Schleswig-Holstein, directly relevant to pre‑school education in the 2020s."},{"title":"Studie zur Entwicklung von Ganztagsschulen – Primarstufe (StEG-Primary) 2020","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA7850","justification":"Focuses on all-day primary schools in Germany in 2020, thus covering compulsory primary education; sample includes schools from several Länder including Schleswig-Holstein."},{"title":"IQB-Bildungstrend 2021 – Hintergrunddaten Lehrkräfte und Schulleitungen in der Primarstufe","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8832","justification":"Companion dataset to IQB-Bildungstrend 2021 with background information on primary-school teachers and principals; includes Schleswig-Holstein and describes framework conditions of compulsory primary education in the early 2020s."}]}
